name: Optimize Existing Fab 12i P3
purpose: Use Singapore Fab 12i P3 as the baseline anchor while management evaluates post-P3 regional options.
business_logic: Preserve execution focus, customer qualification discipline, utilization learning, and capital efficiency from the existing Singapore platform.
why_it_might_matter_for_umc: It provides the operational baseline against which Southeast Asia options should be compared.
data_needed_before_action: P3 ramp status by customer and product family

name: Sales Office
purpose: Provide local account coverage, demand sensing, government and ecosystem relationships, and customer development after Fab 12i P3.
business_logic: A low-capex commercial presence may be useful where UMC has enough named account density or needs closer market sensing.
why_it_might_matter_for_umc: It can clarify mature-node demand, specialty-product pull, and customer support needs before larger commitments.
data_needed_before_action: Local coverage need versus Singapore or Taiwan coverage

name: Customer Engineering Hub
purpose: Support design-in, FAE, quality issue coordination, EMS-linked support, and Fab 12i customer escalation workflows.
business_logic: A technical support hub may matter where customer workflows require local engineering rather than remote coverage.
why_it_might_matter_for_umc: It could improve customer response, support design-ins, and reduce escalation friction if customer workflows are validated.
data_needed_before_action: Escalation model into Singapore and Taiwan

name: Packaging / OSAT Partnership
purpose: Explore partner-first access to packaging, assembly, test, and wafer-to-package coordination after Fab 12i P3.
business_logic: Partnership may capture ecosystem benefits without immediately committing to owned back-end capacity.
why_it_might_matter_for_umc: It could extend Fab 12i customer value if there is validated attach-rate, partner fit, and customer acceptance.
data_needed_before_action: Yield, cycle-time, qualification, and ROIC impact

name: Foundry / Manufacturing Expansion
purpose: Evaluate whether any post-P3 non-Singapore manufacturing role could be relevant over a longer horizon.
business_logic: Manufacturing expansion is the highest-capex option and requires the strongest objective validation before serious study.
why_it_might_matter_for_umc: It is strategically material only if customer commitments, utilities, talent, incentives, and economics are strong enough.
data_needed_before_action: Power, water, land, permitting, and ESG envelope
Capex, opex, utilization, payback, and ROIC model
